scheme_name: Award for Success in State Public Service Commission, Union Public Service Commission Examination (MPBOCWWB)
page_title: Award for Success in State Public Service Commission, Union Public Service Commission Examination (MPBOCWWB)

details: Under the" State Public Service Commission and Union Public Service Commission Examination Success Award Scheme" by the Labour Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, the sons and daughters of registered construction workers who are selected at various levels in the State Public Service Commission or Union Public Service Commission examinations, are provided incentives ranging from ₹15,000/- to ₹50,000/-.
benefits: Incentives Upon Selection in "Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission" Exam
Incentives Upon Selection in "Union Public Service Commission" Exam
eligibility: The applicant should be a resident of Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant should be a Building/ Construction Worker.
The applicant should be between 18 and 60 years.
The applicant should have engaged in any building or other construction work for at least 90 days during the preceding 12 months.
The registration of the applicant should be renewed annually.
The applicant should be a son or daughter of a registered Building/ Construction Worker.
The applicant should be up to 45 years of age.
The applicant should be in possession of a valid identity card issued by the Labour Department.
The applicant should be selected at Preliminary or Main Level of either the "State Public Service Commission Examination" or the "Union Public Service Commission Examination".

offline: Go to the Shram Seva Portal (MPBOCWWB)
On the homepage, find and click on "Registration of Construction Worker."
Enter your Composite Member ID and Samagra Family ID, then click Get Details.
Your family or beneficiary details will be displayed on the screen.
Complete the form by entering all required details (marked with *).
Upload all necessary documents, such as ID proof and other relevant certificates.
After completing the form and uploading the documents, click Submit and pay the application fee online.
You will receive a registration number after successful payment and submission.

documents_required: Proof of Residence (e.g., Utility bill, Voter ID, etc.)
Bank Account Details (e.g., Copy of Bank Passbook)

faqs.question: What is the purpose of this scheme?
faqs.answer: To provide incentives to sons and daughters of registered construction workers for their success in State or Union Public Service Commission examinations.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Sons and daughters of registered construction workers, up to 45 years of age, with a valid identity card.

faqs.question: What exams are covered under this scheme?
faqs.answer: State Public Service Commission and Union Public Service Commission examinations.

faqs.question: What is the incentive for passing the State Public Service Commission Preliminary Exam?
faqs.answer: ₹15,000 is provided for passing the preliminary examination.

faqs.question: What is the incentive for passing the State Public Service Commission Main Exam?
faqs.answer: ₹25,000 is provided for passing the main examination.

faqs.question: What is the incentive for passing the Union Public Service Commission Preliminary Exam?
faqs.answer: ₹25,000 is provided for passing the preliminary examination.

faqs.question: What is the incentive for passing the Union Public Service Commission Main Exam?
faqs.answer: ₹50,000 is provided for passing the main examination.

faqs.question: Is there an age limit for applicants?
faqs.answer: Yes, applicants must be up to 45 years of age.

faqs.question: Do applicants need to submit any documents?
faqs.answer: Yes, a valid identity card issued by the Labour Department is required.

faqs.question: Can applicants avail of benefits for both State and Union exams?
faqs.answer: Yes, benefits are provided for success in both State and Union Public Service Commission examinations.

faqs.question: How to apply for the incentive?
faqs.answer: Applicants must contact the Labour Department with proof of their success in the relevant examinations and their identity card.
